column1: # Synthetic STRUCTURAL fixture for tests — NOT real AlphaMissense data.
# Mirrors the exact column layout of AlphaMissense_hg38.tsv.gz (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
# ambiguity; per Opción A the real scores are never committed). Values are
# invented but deterministic, used only to verify the join logic aligns rows
# correctly (bug #4 class: silent index misalignment). The real-data guard
# test is run locally against the 71M-row TSV in /tmp and reported, not committed.
